description_for_human: Automatizovaný scanner AI systémů na webech pro splnění EU AI Act. Bezplatný sken za 60 sekund.
description_for_model: AIshield.cz is a Czech SaaS for EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) compliance. It scans websites for AI systems (chatbots, analytics, ML models, recommendation engines), classifies risk levels (unacceptable/high/limited/minimal), and generates required compliance documentation (transparency pages, technical docs, risk assessments, AI registries). Deadline: August 2, 2026. Fines up to 35M EUR. Free scan at aishield.cz/scan. Targets Czech businesses, e-shops, agencies, municipalities.
